name: Meatloaf Loaf with Herbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix breadcrumbs, sausage mix, salt, pepper, dried herbs, parsley, and cold water together in a mixing bowl. Stir very well and set aside.
3. Melt the margarine in a frying pan. Saute the onion for 5 minutes until lightly browned.
4. Add the TVP® mince and continue to saute for 1-2 minutes, then add tomato juice. Stir and simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Stir the contents of the frying pan into the sausage mixture in a bowl.
6. Place the mixture into a greased and lined 2 lb loaf pan and bake for 1 hour.
